description_long: A fit adult male stands confidently, adorned with a large floral lei around his neck and a pendant at the center. He is shirtless, revealing a muscular build and a tattoo on his left leg, and wears knee-length shorts with blue trim and utility pockets. His hands are gloved with fingerless, padded gloves, and he sports open-toed sandals. A mask or decorative object is strapped to his right hip, adding a unique accessory to his ensemble. His hair is styled short and swept back, and his overall appearance suggests a relaxed, beach or summer vibe. The character's attire and accessories are detailed, with visible seams, folds, and layered elements.
description: A muscular adult male in beachwear with a floral lei, shorts, gloves, and sandals, accessorized with a hip-mounted mask and pendant.
description_view_0: Front view shows the floral lei, pendant, muscular torso, shorts, gloves, and sandals clearly.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the lei's depth, glove details, and the tattoo on the left leg.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the lei, the mask strapped to the right hip, and the back of the shorts and sandals.
description_view_3: Right side view emphasizes the mask on the hip, glove details, and the profile of the shorts and sandals.
attribute_clothing_type: casual beachwear with knee-length shorts, fingerless gloves, and a large floral lei accessory
